vocab.example: As a curious child, I treated every sprout in my backyard as a precious botanical specimen for my science experiments.

vocab.meaning: kỹ năng làm vườn điêu luyện
vocab.example: I certainly lacked any horticultural prowess back then, as most of my succulents succumbed to overwatering.

vocab.meaning: cây lá màu/cây cảnh thu hoạch lá
vocab.example: My mother favored foliage plants, so I grew up helping her wipe the dust off the broad, waxy leaves of our indoor rubber tree.
Learning about how nitrogen-fixing bacteria live in the roots of peas taught me the beauty of a symbiotic relationship in nature.
I was fascinated by how a dry, lifeless bulb could remain in a dormant state all winter before suddenly erupting into a tulip.

vocab.meaning: phân hữu cơ giàu dinh dưỡng
vocab.example: We maintained a small bin in the corner of the yard to produce nutrient-rich compost for our fledgling vegetable patch.
I remember the heartbreak of moving my favorite rose bush only for it to suffer from transplant shock and lose all its leaves.

vocab.meaning: di sản thực vật (giống cây truyền thống)
vocab.example: My grandmother insisted on growing heirloom tomatoes, viewing them as a vital part of our family's botanical heritage.

vocab.meaning: mang lại một vụ thu hoạch
vocab.example: It took months of patient tending before my strawberry plants finally began to yield a harvest of sweet, crimson fruits.
I spent my childhood summers picking aromatic herbs like basil and rosemary to help my father with the evening meal.
